title: Data Analyst
description: GitLab, the all-in-one DevOps platform used by millions of developers, is seeking a Data Analyst for our Dallas office. You'll analyze product usage, identify trends, and inform product strategy decisions. Work onsite in Dallas while collaborating with global teams to measure what matters and drive data-informed decisions across the organization.
responsibilities: Design and run analytics queries using SQL to answer business questions
Create dashboards and visualizations to track key product metrics
Analyze user behavior and product usage patterns
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on data-driven decisions
Document analytical methodologies and findings clearly
Monitor data quality and troubleshoot analytics issues

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field
skills: Data visualization tools (Tableau, Looker, or similar)
